manifest.author: Scott Tomaszewski (Xentis)
manifest.name: Tag Tactician
manifest.description: Better tag management: bulk operations, navigation by tags, and find related notes through tag similarity.

manifest.author: quantavil
manifest.name: Tag Timer
manifest.description: Add inline timers to any line in your notes.

manifest.author: Studio Gamma
manifest.name: Tag Toggler
manifest.description: Hide specific tag nodes from Graph View by converting tags to plain text (e.g. #Year → —#Year). Unhide to restore them.

manifest.author: Joaq33
manifest.name: Tag View Untagged
manifest.description: Shows untagged file count in Tags sidebar with quick browser and live sync.

repo.Err: Plugin tag-word-cloud was removed, skipping repository extraction

manifest.author: PJ Eby
manifest.name: Tag Wrangler
manifest.description: Rename, merge, toggle, and search tags from the tags view

manifest.author: Björn Kindler
manifest.name: Tagescape
manifest.description: Suppresses inline tag recognition in body text. Only tags in frontmatter properties are kept.

manifest.author: taggrobs
manifest.name: Taggr Sync
manifest.description: Bidirectional sync with Taggr, a decentralized publishing platform. Push notes to publish in social feeds, pull posts back as markdown. Earn from engagement.

manifest.author: Marten Tietje
manifest.name: Tagline
manifest.description: Create notes from inline text with tag-driven templates. Add inline fields, get autocomplete suggestions, and convert lines to linked notes with frontmatter.

manifest.author: pan4ratte
manifest.name: Tags Color Files
manifest.description: Allows you to automatically color files in file explorer based on the tags they contain.

manifest.author: Christian Wannerstedt
manifest.name: Tags Overview
manifest.description: Adds an extended tags panel where tagged files can be overviewed, filtered and accessed in an easy way.

manifest.author: Ken
manifest.name: Tags Routes
manifest.description: A powerful 3D graph visualization tool offers dynamic time-lapse, intelligent orphan file management, tag-based queries, and a range of displaying customization options for a great insightful experience.

manifest.author: caorol
manifest.name: Tagser
manifest.description: Edit the value of the `tags` property.

manifest.author: Nicholas Wilcox
manifest.name: Tailwind Snippet
manifest.description: Use TailwindCSS utility classes in your markup.

manifest.author: LJ Robinson
manifest.name: TapLog
manifest.description: Create configurable one-tap tracker notes with CSV logs and monthly summaries.

manifest.author: Kalpit Jain
manifest.name: Tare Money
manifest.description: A local-first money tracker.

manifest.author: TwoFive Labs
manifest.name: Target Word Count
manifest.description: Disable editing until you've added a target number of words.

manifest.author: Tarslab
manifest.name: Tars
manifest.description: Text generation based on tag suggestions, using DeepSeek, Claude, OpenAI, OpenRouter, SiliconFlow, Gemini, Qwen & more.

manifest.author: Mythra PS
manifest.name: Task Accountability Tracker
manifest.description: Track your daily note engagement with statistics showing which days you didn't engage with your tasks. Includes streak tracking and customizable thresholds.

manifest.author: Atmanand Gauns
manifest.name: Task Board
manifest.description: Manage all your tasks throughout your vault from a single board and much more...

manifest.author: CorrectRoadH
manifest.name: Task Center
manifest.description: AI-ready task board with day/week/month views, natural-language Quick Add, task trees, mobile gestures, and CLI commands over plain markdown.

manifest.author: Anareaty
manifest.name: Task Count
manifest.description: Count tasks in notes and save result to properties.

manifest.author: cybertramp
manifest.name: Task Director
manifest.description: Manage and change tasks targeting a specific page

manifest.author: Raoul Jacobs
manifest.name: Task Export Tool
manifest.description: Export outstanding tasks to CSV for time tracking integration (e.g. ManicTime).

manifest.author: Carlos
manifest.name: Task Hub
manifest.description: Manage vault, Apple Reminders, Apple Calendar, and Dida/TickTick tasks in one workspace.

manifest.author: John Gesimondo
manifest.name: Task Limiter
manifest.description: Limit task items per section using [limit=N] tags. Visually marks over-limit lines.

manifest.author: Ted Marozzi
manifest.name: Task list
manifest.description: Enable better task management via lists.

manifest.author: Chris Kerr, Erika Rice Scherpelz
manifest.name: Task List Kanban
manifest.description: Organizes all of the tasks within your files into a kanban view. Reduce duplication of effort when managing and prioritising tasks by simply using the task format in your files to automatically appear in your Task List Kanban.

manifest.author: Mariia Nebesnaia
manifest.name: Task Mover
manifest.description: Move unfinished tasks to the daily note automatically

manifest.author: Selfish
manifest.name: Task Planner
manifest.description: Manage tasks with drag-and-drop planning, Today focus, backlog, overdue tracking, and weekly time horizons.

manifest.author: Dipen
manifest.name: Task Priority Matrix
manifest.description: A visual matrix for prioritizing tasks by urgency and importance, based on the Eisenhower Matrix method.

manifest.author: Stifer
manifest.name: Task Project Tree
manifest.description: Turn folders into task projects with overview notes and tree-based progress. Right-click any folder to set it as a project, then see live task completion badges in the file explorer.

manifest.author: Lucas Mantuan
manifest.name: Task States
manifest.description: Toggle task states by clicking the checkbox, cycling through TODO, PRIORITY, PROGRESS, STANDBY, CANCELLED and DONE in Markdown task lists, with reorderable states, a non-cyclic NOTE state, per-state colors, and an optional task date.

manifest.author: Valerie Burzynski
manifest.name: Task Status
manifest.description: Quickly select and apply custom task status markers

manifest.author: gansxx
manifest.name: Task Timestamp Marker
manifest.description: Mark task timestamp and Archieve tasks.

manifest.author: Alan Grainger
manifest.name: Task Zero
manifest.description: A keyboard-first GTD task management system.

manifest.author: Dominik Schlund
manifest.name: Taskbone
manifest.description: Sync Obsidian with Todoist, extract text from images (OCR).

manifest.author: Hiroya Iizuka
manifest.name: TaskChute Plus
manifest.description: Execute TaskChute that slots today's tasks, tracks projects, adds comments, and keeps you focused on now.

manifest.author: poanse
manifest.name: Taskmap
manifest.description: Plan projects via interactive GUI task trees with automatic layout.

manifest.author: Callum Alpass
manifest.name: TaskNotes
manifest.description: Note-based task management with calendar, pomodoro and time-tracking integration.

manifest.author: minorchange
manifest.name: TaskNotes Project Colors
manifest.description: Automatically colors TaskNotes task cards by project using a deterministic hash-based color scheme.

manifest.author: Callum Alpass
manifest.name: TaskNotes Workflows
manifest.description: Markdown-defined workflow automation for TaskNotes.

manifest.author: Thomas Herden
manifest.name: Packrat
manifest.description: Process completed recurring Tasks
